input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(245, 114, 91) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(40, 40, 40) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].font-family: "??", "TT2020 Base", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

input[type=\"text\"].font-family: "??", "TT2020 Base", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

mark.background: rgba(255, 229, 167, 0.3) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
